calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James McElroy for and with Reijes Shoats.

Mr. McElroy explained Mr. Shoats' circumstances and how distribution occured. Mr. McElroy also stated that the City and County San Francisco settled their claim for $35,000.00, that he did pro bono Attorney work Mr. Shoats, that CA Victims Compensation does not apply and that the Franchise Tax Board has been informed. Mr. Shoats stated that he is willing to waive an accounting, that the numbers make sense to him, that he is waiving Administrator's fees and that he is okay with the petition. The Accounting Petition was taken under submission for Mr. McElroy to file a declaration regarding Probate Code 9202(b) and for Mr. McElroy to provide a proposed order on final distribution on waiver of account.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-17-2012 Continued To Apr-10-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James McElroy for and with Reijess Shoats.

Mr. McElroy stated that he settled the City and County of San Francisco's $131,000.00 claim but he needed to deal with settlement of the $2,000.00 claim with the Tax Collector. The accounting petition was continued to April 10, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Final Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Continued To Nov-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

A Notice to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on November 16, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Petition for Final Distribution or Report on Status of Administration has not been filed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Final Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-24-2011 Continued To Sep-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Final Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-29-2011 Continued To Aug-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Reijess Shoats in Propria Persona.

Attorney James McElroy was not present. Reijess Shoats stated that the Attorney was not present due to a medical issue. The Court expressed concern stating that the inventory and appraisal was at $64,000.00 but $104,000.00 was distributed from the Estate. Mr. Shoats explained his circumstances and the need/reasons for the Attorney making distributions. The matter was continued to August 24, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
